description: OneAI self-hosted model registry manifest. Consumed by OneStack's `oneai_releases` model-catalog source. Each model is published as a GHCR OCI artifact (via the build-model-artifact workflow) and deployed by Core via ORAS-pull into the local serving path.

models.name: Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct FP8-Static
models.description: Self-quantized FP8-Static (per-tensor static weights + activations; vision tower kept bf16) from the official Qwen/Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct. Validated parity with bf16 original and the AngelSlim reference on the same VLMEvalKit pipeline (OCRBench 89.6, ChartQA 83.0, MMStar_MINI 54.7) with ~+66% decode vs bf16. Boots on onestack-vllm:v0.24.0 with no env var (per-tensor static dodges the DeepGEMM block-scaled crash).

models.name: Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507 FP8-Static
models.description: Self-quantized FP8-Static (per-tensor W8A8 static weights + activations; lm_head kept bf16) from the official Qwen/Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507. Calibrated on 512 GovReport documents. Validated summary-quality parity with the official block-FP8 on real GovReport/arXiv docs; ~223 tok/s decode on RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell (9x the RTX 4000 baseline). The summary model for the RTX6000 AG. Boots on onestack-vllm:v0.24.0 with no env var (per-tensor static dodges the DeepGEMM block-scaled crash).
